title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Celebi India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Celebi India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Celebi India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Celebi India International Enterprises:
Celebi India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India International Enterprises!
